settings.title: Complete your look

settings.title: Description
settings.content:
• Highly functional and padded men’s ski jacket
  • Elastic outer material for optimum freedom of movement
  • Breathable, waterproof & windproof ZIENER AQUASHIELD® membrane
  • Waterproof rating: 10,000 mm / Breathability: 10,000 g/m²/24h
  • PFAS-free waterproofing
  • bluesign® certified outer fabric
  • 100 g/m² lightweight, breathable insulation for balanced warmth
  • Keeps you warm even in damp conditions
  • Elastic inner lining for extra comfort and flexibility
  • Fixed, adjustable functional hood
  • Elastic inner sleeve cuffs for a secure fit
  • Fixed snow skirt to keep snow out
  • Underarm ventilation zippers for added airflow
  • Multiple practical pockets for ski goggles, sunglasses & smartphone
  • Ski pass pocket and zipped chest pocket included
  • Ideal combination of comfort, protection & performance on the slopes
